#1 BENSON/FIELDS: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W/ ATTY R DUDUM. DEFTS J MCDONALD & G ZIEGLER PRESENT IN PRO PER. DEFT G ZIEGLER GUEST ONLY, NO CLAIM OF POSSESSION, WILL BE DISMISSED. SETTLED. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT J MCDONALD. PLTF TO PREPARE STIP, JDMT & DISMISSAL.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDONALD, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 785 BURNETT #4 $2,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, END OF DAY. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. DEFT WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR $4000.
